input.initialPrompt: I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

data.reasoningText: The user is asking how to filter tests by category when running `dotnet test`. Let me look at the test files to understand what test framework and category attributes are being used.

data.content:
Since this project uses MSTest with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`, use the `--filter` option:

```
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will run only the 3 tests tagged `[TestCategory("Integration")]`: `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase`, `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`, and `ProcessPayment_GatewayTimeout_Retries`.
